title: Stale-content regression fix + SO answer upgrade + execution board rescue
actions: Identified stale-content bypass in regeneration guard (L5618-5619 of distribution_lane_executor.py)
Rescued execution board from 6-day staleness (May 25 guard_pause → current May 31 reality)
Substantially improved SO answer draft: 886 → 4,474 bytes, 5 concrete Django-specific sections
Updated SO handoff packet with corrected live-API stats and answer quality assessment
Updated MARKETING_SELF_IMPROVEMENT.md with stale-content guard bypass finding + enforcement rule
summary: SO answer now survivable on StackOverflow. Execution board reflects current reality. Stale-content guard bypass documented.
